name: Connecticut DCP Occupational Trades Lookup

agency.name: Connecticut Department of Consumer Protection Occupational and Professional Licensing Division

updateFrequency: unknown; verify current credential status in Connecticut eLicense
licenseTypesIncluded: Plumbing, piping, well-drilling, and pool/spa contractor licenses
Heating, piping, cooling, and sheet-metal contractor licenses
Solar electric and solar thermal contractor licenses
knownExclusions: The shared eLicense portal covers many professions and credential levels; contractor and journeyperson records must not be conflated.
General construction, home improvement, new-home construction, asbestos work, and local permits are covered separately.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not bypass or automate portal controls.
publicRecordsNotes: Official credential lookup metadata only. Absence from one license type is not proof that no other authorization exists.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: DCP references roster generation, but no stable public export contract or redistribution position has been reviewed.
researchNotes: DCP occupational boards license contractors and individuals across electrical, plumbing/piping, HVAC, sheet metal, pool/spa, and solar scopes. eLicense remains a manual handoff.
verificationCaveats: Credential type and contractor-versus-journeyperson level must be preserved.
No match means no matching record in the selected source and credential type at the checked time.
verificationNotes: No supported adapter is exposed while the shared portal lacks a reviewed stable machine interface.
maintainerNotes: Future adapters must retain board, license class, and individual/business distinctions.

researchEvidence.note: Official board page documents licensed electrical contractors and journeypersons.
Official board page documents plumbing, pipefitting, well-drilling, and pool/spa licensing.
Official DCP page states heating, cooling, and sheet-metal workers must be licensed by DCP.
Official DCP page documents ST-1 solar thermal and PV-1 solar electric contractor credentials.

blocker.summary: The shared interactive lookup has no reviewed stable machine-readable contract for these credentials.
